description: The Solana Core Community Call on February 17, 2023, features discussions on application fees by Galactus from the Mango team and timely vote credits by Zentetsu. Galactus introduces a new fee structure for decentralized applications (dApps) that allows fees to be paid to the dApp authority instead of validators, with a rebate mechanism for users. The aim is to reduce network congestion and discourage spam transactions. The call includes technical details about the implementation of application fees and instructions for dApps.
topic_summary: Discussion on new application fees for dApps and their impact on Solana's network congestion, featuring Galactus from Mango and Zentetsu.
